description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: test and package-dmg. The test job runs on macOS, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt 5.15.2, sets up dependencies, builds the project with tests, and runs tests. The package-dmg job depends on test, runs on macOS, and performs similar setup before building, packaging, notarizing, and uploading a DMG file.
